## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and performance tracking for growthx.ai and Augment projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to develop a structured content roadmap for upcoming weeks, focusing on high-potential topics and improving quality](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Implement automated performance tracking dashboard using Airtable for efficient reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Review and optimize tracking of prompts for Augment, ensuring comprehensive coverage of relevant clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Prioritize refreshing high-potential listicles and comparison articles to improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Roadmap

  - [Nathalie to create a content roadmap, outlining topic clusters and content types for the next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Focus on easily producible content (e.g., "How to sort an array in C++") to buy time for quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Identify 20-30 high-potential articles for refreshing, starting with 1-2 per week](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Prioritize listicles, comparisons, and alternatives as high-performing content types](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

### Performance Tracking Dashboard

  - [Implement automated Airtable dashboard for weekly reporting](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Key metrics: articles published, newsletter stats, traffic (pages, impressions), signups, email subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Include presence metrics for Augment (percentage and total number of prompts with presence)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Jason to task Suleman with setting up the dashboard, pulling data from various sources (PostHog, Beehive, VGSC, Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Content Quality Improvement

  - [Nathalie to document issues and gaps found during editing process](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Focus on improving structure for listicles and comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Separate immediate manual improvements from long-term workflow enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Schedule call with Jason and Marisol to create engineering tickets for workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)

### Augment Prompt Tracking

  - [Review and optimize current prompt tracking in Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Ensure comprehensive coverage of relevant clusters (e.g., alternatives, best tools)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Standardize prompt wording for consistency (e.g., "X as an alternative to Y")](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
  - [Nathalie to map tracked prompts to planned content topics](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2364.0)

### SEO and Backlink Strategy

  - [Backlink strategy showing positive results, improving keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2410.0)
  - [Update article titles to include year (e.g., "Best AI Coding Tools in 2025") for better LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [Add "last updated" dates to articles to signal recency to LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nathalie to create content roadmap and share with Jason](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Select 1-2 high-potential articles to refresh this week](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Implement automated performance tracking dashboard (Jason to task Suleman)](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Review and optimize Augment prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Update article titles and add "last updated" dates for improved LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [Prioritize and send social posts for Surge to Jason for review](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2772.0)
  - [Schedule meeting to review Augment-related tasks later in the week](https://fathom.video/share/Lx2EiWoiNWYS-1n1dFzNXUYaXpxECNYF?tab=summary&timestamp=2790.0)

action_items.description: Task Suleman to set up automated reporting in Airtable. Pull data from PostHog, Beehive, VGSC, Scrunch.
Create content roadmap doc. Include content tree, pillars, clusters, forks. Share with Jason.
Select 2 high-potential articles (listicles/comparisons) from PostHog. Refresh & improve. Document process.
Document content issues/gaps found during editing. Prep for call with Jason & Marisol re workflow improvements.
Review Augment prompts tracking. Ensure comprehensive coverage of clusters. Update list as needed.
Update "best AI coding tools" article title. Add "2025". Ensure last updated date visible for LLMs.
